description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence section constructed from six vertical planks, each with a slightly irregular width and spacing, giving it a handcrafted appearance. The planks are joined by two horizontal rails, one near the top and one near the bottom, and reinforced by a diagonal brace for added stability. The wood is dark-stained, showing visible grain and some weathering, suggesting outdoor use. The top edges of the planks are cut flat but with slightly rounded corners, and there are no decorative elements or post caps. The overall structure is sturdy but lightweight enough to be movable, typical for use as a garden or yard barrier. The back side reveals the supporting rails and diagonal brace, while the front is defined by the vertical planks.
description: A rustic, dark-stained wooden fence section with six vertical planks, two horizontal rails, and a diagonal brace, showing visible wood grain and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing six vertical planks, two horizontal rails, and a diagonal brace.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the depth of the planks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal rails and diagonal brace more prominently.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the fence.
